\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3450 introduces Energy Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \nabla \times \mathbf{E} = - \frac{\partial \mathbf{B}}{\partial t}, \]
